name: Chicken Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 4-oz skinned and boned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Make Tex-Mex Spice Mix: Combine 3 tablespoons chili powder, 2 tablespoons ground cumin, 1 tablespoon ground black pepper, 1 tablespoon salt, 1 tablespoon garlic powder, and 1 1/2 teaspoons ground red pepper in a bowl. Store the mixture in a sealed container for up to 3 months.
2. Make Spicy Southwestern Dressing: Combine 1 tablespoon Tex-Mex Spice Mix, 2 tablespoons lime juice, 1 tablespoon vegetable oil, 2 tablespoons water, and 1 teaspoon sugar in a bowl. Stir until well combined.
3. Coat the chicken with the Tex-Mex spice mix. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours.
4. Cook the chicken in a large nonstick skillet coated with cooking spray over medium heat for 4-5 minutes on each side.
5. Chill the cooked chicken.
6. Chop the cooled chicken and add it to a medium bowl. Add the mango and the next four ingredients (green pepper, sweet red pepper, jicama, cilantro) to the bowl. Toss with Spicy Southwestern Dressing until well combined.
7. Place each tortilla in a medium-sized microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high for 1.5 minutes or until crispy.
8. Divide the lettuce among the tortilla shells and top with the chicken mixture.
